description:
Implement `hx-dropdown` (T2 tier) â€” 5/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Button that opens a floating menu on click.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dropdown/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-dropdown.ts`, `hx-dropdown.styles.ts`, `hx-dropdown.stories.ts`, `hx-dropdown.test.ts`

**Props:** `open` (boolean), `placement` (top/bottom/start/end variants), `disabled` (boolean), `distance` (number, px gap)

**Slots:** `trigger` (the button/element that opens dropdown), default (hx-menu content)

**Events:** `hx-show`, `hx-hide`, `hx-select` (forwarded from inner hx-menu)

**CSS Parts:** `trigger`, `panel`

**ARIA:** Trigger gets `aria-haspopup="true"`, `aria-expanded`. Panel gets `role="menu"`. Keyboard: Enter/Space/Arrow Down on trigger opens menu, Escape closes, Tab closes and moves focus out.

**Composition:** `hx-dropdown` wraps `hx-menu` internally (or uses slots for the menu). Study how `hx-tooltip` positions its floating content â€” use the same mechanism. The trigger slot accepts any element; default trigger is `hx-button`.

**Close behavior:** Close on: item select, Escape, click outside, Tab out.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (open/close, keyboard, item select closes), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with button trigger + icon trigger + custom trigger, bundle < 5KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-dropdown â€” T2 Dropdown Button with Menu
